raw: {"trigger_ref": "019db41a-6342-7001-902a-e335442a9ce8", "tenant_id": "019db41a-6342-7001-902a-e335442a9ce8", "claim_ops": [], "reasoning_trace": "This event is a code review comment about a partial-refund edge case. However, the retrieved context contains no observations, models, acts, resources, or actor UUIDs to scope any Model to. There are no actors_in_context UUIDs, no commitments to reference, no entities to scope to. Without any UUIDs to populate scope_actors or scope_entities, any Model I insert would be unscoped (both fields empty), which violates the rule that empty scope on both fields is almost always wrong. The signal is too thin — it's a review comment with no linked PR, no author identity, no associated commitment or ticket in context. I cannot responsibly emit a Model without scoping it to real entities from the context. Zero claim_ops is the correct minimal diff here."}
